ns1:revision.ns1:text:
'''Server support for kernels: '''
*RHEL 7.7 (3.10.0-1062.9.1.el7) '''Client support for unpatched kernels: '''
*RHEL 7.7 (3.10.0-1062.9.1.el7) *RHEL 8.1 (4.18.0-147.3.1.el8_1) *SLES12 SP4 (4.12.14-95.29.1) *Ubuntu 18.04 (4.15.0-72) '''Recommended e2fsprogs version: '''
*v1.45.2.wc1-0 '''Interoperability Support: '''
*Clients & Servers: Latest 2.10.X and Latest 2.11.X == Issues fixed between 2.12.3 and 2.12.4 == ''' New Feature ''' *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-1365 LU-1365]: Implement ldiskfs LARGEDIR support for e2fsprogs ''' Improvement ''' *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-8207 LU-8207]: Add auto-stripe option to lfs_migrate *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11221 LU-11221]: Do not hold pages locked for network IO on the server. *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11367 LU-11367]: integrate LSOM with lfs find *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11526 LU-11526]: Support 64MB I/O RPC *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11673 LU-11673]: Correct shell issues/mistakes in Lustre test suites *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11739 LU-11739]: Don't inherit default layout from root for new subdirectories *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12103 LU-12103]: Improve block allocation for large partitions *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12236 LU-12236]: Support more than the default root network namespace *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12533 LU-12533]: Improve readahead RPC issuance for large window sizes *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12899 LU-12899]: Make Lustre build report the required package: kernel-rpm-macros *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13059 LU-13059]: kernel update [RHEL7.7 3.10.0-1062.9.1.el7] *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13098 LU-13098]: supress connection restore message on idling connections ''' Bug ''' *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-1957 LU-1957]: Test failure on test suite sanity, subtest test_180b *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-4398 LU-4398]: mdt_object_open_lock() may not flush conflicting handles *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-9341 LU-9341]: PFL: append should not instantiate full layout *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11157 LU-11157]: sanity test_42e: invalid arithmetic operator (error token is ".9") *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11204 LU-11204]: mdt_reint_unlink->lu_object_put() crash *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11239 LU-11239]: sanity-lfsck test 36a fails with 'Fail to split mirror' *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11385 LU-11385]: client hit BUG: unable to handle kernel NULL pointer dereference at 0000000000000028 *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11575 LU-11575]: make debs fail on debian without systemd enabled *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11626 LU-11626]: mdc: obd might go away while referenced by code in mdc_changelog *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11656 LU-11656]: "lfs getstripe" on directory does not show default root layout *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11670 LU-11670]: Incorrect size when using lockahead *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11743 LU-11743]: lctl pool operations cannot be run on separate MGS system *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11768 LU-11768]: sanity-quota test 6 fails with ‘LNet: Service thread pid <pid> was inactive for …’ *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11770 LU-11770]: preserve kernel API when T10-PI patches are applied *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11867 LU-11867]: OST precreate object FID in LMA mismatch causes OST unusable *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11907 LU-11907]: sanity fails to cleanup d60g.sanity *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11911 LU-11911]: lov_iocontrol: BUG: unable to handle kernel NULL pointer dereference at 0000000000000100 *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11933 LU-11933]: sanity-hsm: test_406 sanity: test_230b osd_declare_dir_delete() ASSERTION( dt_object_exists(dt) ) *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11956 LU-11956]: conf-sanity test_32a failed with 1 *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11967 LU-11967]: MDS LBUG ASSERTION( o->opo_reserved == 0 ) failed *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11981 LU-11981]: lnet_is_health_check() Msg is in inconsistent state, don't perform health checking (0, 2) *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11997 LU-11997]: Crash in lustre_swab_fiemap *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12025 LU-12025]: Adding OST may cause EIO - delay activation of new OSTs on existing filesystem *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12131 LU-12131]: Improve GSS/SSK handling in Lustre test suite *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12328 LU-12328]: FLR mirroring on 2.12.1-1 not usable if OST is down *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12411 LU-12411]: Hang on lnetctl route del *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12441 LU-12441]: Response tracker is not detached on router ping reply *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12462 LU-12462]: osc_cache_writeback_range(): ASSERTION( ext->oe_start >= start && ext->oe_end <= end ) failed *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12469 LU-12469]: sanity test_230b crash: LBUG of lu_buf_free in mdd_iterate_xattrs *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12503 LU-12503]: LustreError: 19435:0:(vvp_io.c:1056:vvp_io_write_start()) LBUG *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12530 LU-12530]: udev add/change rule loads zfs module on clients *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12568 LU-12568]: LNetError: 28086:0:(lib-move.c:2862:lnet_detach_rsp_tracker()) ASSERTION( rspt->rspt_cpt == cpt ) failed *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12593 LU-12593]: update_log corruption *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12595 LU-12595]: Attempt to add route using non-local gateway should return EHOSTUNREACH, not EINVAL *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12622 LU-12622]: Another batch of test fixes for SSK *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12639 LU-12639]: sanity test 317 uses uninitialized variable $facet *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12671 LU-12671]: replay-vbr accesses non-existent mdd.sync_permission setting *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12674 LU-12674]: osp should handle -EINPROGRESS on llog objects *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12691 LU-12691]: obd_max_recoverable_clients is not atomic *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12703 LU-12703]: sanity test_421a: FAIL: rmfid with fsname failed *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12707 LU-12707]: mds-survey test 1 crashes with a NULL pointer dereference in echo_object_free() *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12719 LU-12719]: crash in lustre_find_lwp_by_index() *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12741 LU-12741]: crash in osd_object_delete at end of sanity *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12745 LU-12745]: Lustre fails to compile against zfs dkms 0.8+ *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12759 LU-12759]: parameter grant_shrink gets reset to 1 after client reconnects *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12760 LU-12760]: sanity test_161d incorrect use of stack_trap *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12769 LU-12769]: replay-dual test 0b hangs in client mount *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12791 LU-12791]: kernel update [RHEL8.0 4.18.0-80.11.2.el8_0] *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12799 LU-12799]: NULL pointer dereference IP: ptlrpc_disconnect_and_idle_import *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12803 LU-12803]: lustre in staging interferes with 2.12.2 on Ubuntu 18.04 *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12824 LU-12824]: Unable to add single Infiniband interface to multiple o2ib LNets *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12826 LU-12826]: Project quotas: users can change project IDs *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12842 LU-12842]: lctl llog_print doesn't accept snapshot names with leading number *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12844 LU-12844]: error: ‘strncpy’ specified bound depends on the length of the source argument *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12853 LU-12853]: general protection fault: 0000 RIP: keys_fill *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12856 LU-12856]: LustreError: 82937:0:(ldlm_lib.c:3268:target_bulk_io()) @@@ truncated bulk READ 0(270336) *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12859 LU-12859]: Both "flock" and "localflock" appear in /proc/mounts *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12893 LU-12893]: lnet: peer ni selection broken *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12894 LU-12894]: SSK regression in 2.12.3 *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12898 LU-12898]: building lustre utils on ppc64le fails with error format expects llu but argument is __u64 *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12920 LU-12920]: build: lbuild script should not continue if it's missing ed *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12925 LU-12925]: interop: conf-sanity test 62 fails with “Restart of mds1 failed!” *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12928 LU-12928]: recovery-small test_136: crash in sec2target_str() with review-dne-selinux-ssk *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12935 LU-12935]: MDT deadlock on 2.12.3 with DoM; is it missing async_discard feature? *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12944 LU-12944]: Migration corrupts xattrs *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12946 LU-12946]: Multipath path flapping issue *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12965 LU-12965]: class_import_put()) ASSERTION( _v >= 0 && _v < 0x5a5a5a5a ) failed: value: 1515870810 *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12967 LU-12967]: sanity test 80 silently fails to get sync_on_lock_cancel parameter *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13043 LU-13043]: Project quotas: force to ignore quota flags =8 on quota exceeded *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13061 LU-13061]: osd_fid_lookup()) ASSERTION( fid_is_sane(fid) || fid_is_idif(fid) ) failed: [0x0:0x68:0x0] *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13070 LU-13070]: mdd_orphan_destroy loop caused by compatibility issue on upgrades to 2.11 or later *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13077 LU-13077]: Cleanup xattr checking *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13087 LU-13087]: The server highest transno can be lost, client reports 'went back in time' *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13092 LU-13092]: include lbuild-{fc,rhel,sles} to SIGNATURE *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13099 LU-13099]: ll_set_inode()) Can not initialize inode warning *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13121 LU-13121]: ll_update_lsm_md() may deadlock *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13145 LU-13145]: LNet Health: increase transaction timeout *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-13194 LU-13194]: Interop: sanityn test 104 fails with '/mnt/lustre/f104.sanityn mtime (1580286855:1580286853) diff' ''' Task ''' *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-12026 LU-12026]: verify that MDS stores atime/mtime/ctime during LSOM update [[Category:Releases]]
